<?php namespace Illuminate\Contracts\Pagination; /** * @template TKey of array-key * * @template-covariant TValue * * @extends Paginator<TKey, TValue> */ interface LengthAwarePaginator extends Paginator { /** * Create a range of pagination URLs. * * @param int $start * @param int $end * @return array */ public function getUrlRange($start, $end); /** * Determine the total number of items in the data store. * * @return int */ public function total(); /** * Get the page number of the last available page. * * @return int */ public function lastPage(); }
